text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Could we perhaps cut our<n>meeting a
little short today?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
One of my juniors seeks my advice, and I<n>also
need to help the dorm keeper with<n>something.
After that, there's the study<n>session I need to—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Apologies. As you can see, I'm<n>quite the
busy bee.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Um... Please don't look at me like that. I<n>assure
you I'm not overworking myself. I<n>swear!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...All right, I shall adjust my schedule. I<n>certainly
don't wish to worry you any<n>further.
